metadata.description: The name of the existing User Assigned Managed Identity.
The resource group name where the existing UAMI lives.
Reference to an existing User Assigned Managed Identity (UAMI).
Index of the UAMI in `existingUserAssignedIdentities` whose principalId receives the role.
Role definition GUID to grant at Container App scope.
A (UAMI, role definition) pair generated for each role assignment iteration.
The Microsoft Entra principal (object) ID that receives the role.
Role definition GUID to grant at Container App scope.
A (principal object ID, role definition) pair generated for each service principal/user role assignment iteration.
The name of the scenario, used to derive resource names
The location for the resource group and Container Apps resources
Tags applied to all resources
Container image to run in the Container App
Optional. Override container command
Optional. Override container args
CPU allocation (vCPU). Example: 0.5
Memory allocation. Example: 1Gi
Minimum replicas
Maximum replicas
Ingress target port
When true, enables external HTTPS ingress
The SKU name for the Azure Container Registry (ACR)
When true, enables Easy Auth (built-in authentication) with Microsoft Entra ID on the Container App endpoint
When Easy Auth is enabled, require authentication (redirect unauthenticated clients to login)
Client ID of the Entra ID app registration (required when Easy Auth is enabled)
Allowed audiences for Easy Auth token validation
Optional. Array of existing User Assigned Managed Identities (UAMI) to attach to the Container App and grant roles at Container App scope. Defaults to an empty array.
Optional. Array of object (principal) IDs of existing Microsoft Entra service principals to grant roles at Container App scope. Defaults to an empty array.
Optional. Array of object IDs of existing Microsoft Entra users to grant roles at Container App scope. Defaults to an empty array.
Role definition GUIDs assigned to every existing UAMI, service principal, and user at Container App scope. Defaults to empty array (no role assignments).
The name of the resource group
The Azure region where the resource group will be created
Tags applied to the resource group
The resource ID of the resource group
The name of the resource group
The location of the resource group
The name of the Log Analytics workspace
The Azure region where the Log Analytics workspace will be created
Tags applied to the Log Analytics workspace
The retention period (days) for workspace data
The resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace
The name of the Log Analytics workspace
The name of the Azure Container Registry (ACR). Must be 5-50 characters and alphanumeric only.
The Azure region where the registry will be created
Tags applied to the registry
The SKU name for the registry
When true, enables the admin user (username/password). Defaults to false for Entra ID authentication.
Public network access setting
When true, allows anonymous pull access. Defaults to false.
The resource ID of the registry
The name of the registry
The login server hostname of the registry
The name of the User Assigned Managed Identity
The Azure region where the User Assigned Managed Identity will be created
Tags applied to the User Assigned Managed Identity
The resource ID of the User Assigned Managed Identity
The name of the User Assigned Managed Identity
The principal ID of the User Assigned Managed Identity (used for role assignments)
The client ID of the User Assigned Managed Identity
The tenant ID of the User Assigned Managed Identity
The name of the Container Apps environment
The Azure region where the Container Apps environment will be created
Tags applied to the Container Apps environment
Log Analytics workspace customer ID (GUID)
Log Analytics workspace shared key. Required for environment creation.
When true, enables zone redundancy (region dependent)
The resource ID of the Container Apps environment
The name of the Container Apps environment
The default domain assigned to this environment
The static IP address of this environment (empty when not assigned)
The name of the Container App
The Azure region where the Container App will be created
Tags applied to the Container App
The resource ID of the target Container Apps environment
Optional. Resource IDs of User Assigned Managed Identities (UAMI) to attach. Defaults to empty array.
When true, enables System Assigned Managed Identity
Container image to run
Container name within the app
Optional. Override container command
Optional. Override container args
Container environment variables. Each element is `{ name, value }` or `{ name, secretRef }`.
CPU allocation (vCPU). Example: 0.5
Memory allocation. Example: 1Gi
Minimum replicas
Maximum replicas
Ingress target port
When true, enables external HTTPS ingress
Ingress transport protocol
Registries configuration. Each element is `{ server, identity }` where `identity` is a UAMI resource ID used for Entra ID-based pulls.
Secrets configuration for the Container App
When true, enables Easy Auth (built-in authentication) with Microsoft Entra ID
When Easy Auth is enabled, require authentication (redirect unauthenticated clients to login)
Client ID of the Entra ID app registration (required when Easy Auth is enabled)
OpenID issuer URL. When empty, derives `https://login.microsoftonline.com/<tenantId>/v2.0`.
Allowed audiences for Easy Auth token validation

variables.userAssignedIdentitiesObject: [reduce(parameters('userAssignedIdentityResourceIds'), createObject(), lambda('current', 'id', union(lambdaVariables('current'), createObject(format('{0}', lambdaVariables('id')), createObject()))))]

metadata.description: The resource ID of the Container App
The name of the Container App
The fully qualified domain name (FQDN) of the Container App
The latest revision name of the Container App
The system-assigned managed identity principal ID (empty when disabled)
The name of the target Azure AI Foundry (Cognitive Services) account resource. Provide either this or targetStorageAccountName.
The name of the target Azure Storage Account resource. Provide either this or targetAccountName.
The name of the target Azure Container Registry (ACR) resource. Provide either this or one of the other target*Name parameters.
The name of the target Azure Container App resource. Provide either this or one of the other target*Name parameters.
The principal ID that receives the role assignment
The fully qualified role definition resource ID
The principal type for the role assignment
Optional deterministic seed for role assignment name; when omitted, a deterministic name is generated

variables.roleAssignmentScopeName: [if(variables('useContainerAppTarget'), parameters('targetContainerAppName'), if(variables('useRegistryTarget'), parameters('targetRegistryName'), if(variables('useStorageTarget'), parameters('targetStorageAccountName'), parameters('targetAccountName'))))]

metadata.description: The resource ID of the role assignment

id.value: [coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(if(variables('useContainerAppTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.App/containerApps', if(not(empty(parameters('targetContainerAppName'))), parameters('targetContainerAppName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null()), if(variables('useRegistryTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', if(not(empty(parameters('targetRegistryName'))), parameters('targetRegistryName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null())), if(variables('useStorageTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', if(not(empty(parameters('targetStorageAccountName'))), parameters('targetStorageAccountName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null())), if(variables('useAccountTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), parameters('targetAccountName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null())), '')]

metadata.description: The name of the role assignment

name.value: [coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(if(variables('useContainerAppTarget'), variables('roleAssignmentName'), null()), if(variables('useRegistryTarget'), variables('roleAssignmentName'), null())), if(variables('useStorageTarget'), variables('roleAssignmentName'), null())), if(variables('useAccountTarget'), variables('roleAssignmentName'), null())), variables('roleAssignmentName'))]

metadata.description: The name of the target Azure AI Foundry (Cognitive Services) account resource. Provide either this or targetStorageAccountName.
